across.clue: cloth especially when it is used for making things such as clothes or curtains.
A capital is a city where a country’s government is based.
If something is perfect, then it is without any mistakes.
If something is bright, it gives off a lot of light.
To give all your attention to the thing you are doing.
If a food is delicious, it is tasty.
To belong means to be owned by or to be a member of something.
A nation is a large area of land that is controlled by its own government.
A choice is the act of choosing between two or more things.

down.clue: Fairly means to a certain degree but not very.
To check is to ask someone whether something is correct, true, or allowed.
A battery is an object placed inside something to supply it with electricity.
A pumpkin is a large, round orange vegetable.
A bear is a large, heavy animal with thick fur.
A grocery is a store that sells food.
Marriage is the legally recognized union of two people.
To experience is to do or see something or have something happen to you.
If you talk about something else, you talk about something different.
To reach is to arrive at or get to something.
A goat is an animal with horns and a beard.
